title: AetherisMC
description: This pack was made for the AetherisMC cobblemon server.
body:
# AetherisMC

**AetherisMC** is a NeoForge **1.21.1** Cobblemon focused pack made for the **AetherisMC** server, featuring **Cobblemon** for monster-collecting adventures, Create (and addons), Terralith worldgen, a cozy set of building/decor mods and must-have QoL.

## What the modpack includes : 

🐾 **Cobblemon**: Pokémon-style collecting, battling, and team-building. This modpack includes all pokemon available in cobblemon and more added from ATMxMSD! Megas, Tera, and Dynamax are also included.

🧭 **Terralith**: The modpack uses terralith world generation for more diverse biomes and more interesting landscapes.

📖 **Adventures**: With the **RCT** Mod and it's addons you can face a wide range of challenging trainers and your favorite gym leaders from across multiple regions! 

⚙️ Create: Create and it's addon will allow you to automate alot of things so you can focus on catching them all!

🏡 Cozy Building: We have included multiple decoration & building mods for the builders pleasure!

🗺️ QoL included: Xaero’s Minimap, Sophisticated Backpacks/Storage, Vein Mining, Distant Horizons.

✨ Shaders included: Complimentary Unbound & it's euphoria patches version are both included by default. (toggle off for performance)

# Play your way
You choose your path: Builder, Explorer, Collector, Engineer… or all of the above.


This modpack was made for the AetherisMC server, perfect for playing with friends, building towns, trading, and going on group adventures. Feel free to join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Btd9EKGqGx) for more information.

# Credits

Thank you to all the mod creators who where included in this pack 💛

![Megas, Legendaries & Dynamax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f015032f2695182c5531e812ecbc6ae761aff2df_0.webp)
